app.name: fructa
markets.insurance.title: Insurance
markets.insurance.subtitle: Compare motor & travel cover
compare.title: Compare
compare.subtitle: Overlay rate history · pick up to {n}
compare.chartCaption: Gross effective annual yield · last 12 months
compare.buildingHistory:
History builds as rates update.
Compare net yields below.
compare.empty: Pick funds to compare their yields.
compare.selectHint: Select up to {n} funds to compare.
onboarding.alertsTitle:
We watch the rates
so you don't
onboarding.alertsBody: Get a nudge when a money-market rate moves, a T-bill auction prints, or one of your saved comparisons flips its leader.
onboarding.onBody: You'll hear from us only when something meaningful moves. Fine-tune everything in Settings.
onboarding.offBody: You can switch alerts on any time from Settings › Notifications.
settings.title: Settings
settings.learn.title: Learn
settings.learn.subtitle: MMFs, gross vs net, why rates move
settings.notif.savedSub: Leader flips or gap widens past 0.25
settings.notif.digestSub: A Friday rundown of the market
alerts.title: Alerts
alerts.emptyBody: We'll let you know when a rate you follow moves.
portfolio.title: Portfolio
company.usdFxNote: earns in USD · KES value shown once live FX lands
insure.title: Insurance
company.signalsFoot: Generated from rate history & published documents · not investment advice
company.moneyNote: Funding and policy binding happen on the provider's platform. fructa never moves money.
markets.disclaimer: Gross effective annual yields as published; net strips 15% withholding tax. Every figure is timestamped and traceable to its source. fructa never holds your funds.
insure.homeSub: Compare cover in minutes, not weeks
insure.motorSub: One value in, ranked comprehensive quotes out
insure.travelSub: Priced by region and length of trip
insure.whyPriciest: Why the priciest is worth a look
insure.motorFoot: Premiums are the base comprehensive rate on your value; add-ons and levies are quoted at binding.
insure.disc.home: fructa compares published rates and cover. It never sells policies or moves money; you bind directly with the insurer or their agent.
insure.disc.motor: Indicative comprehensive premiums from each insurer's rate of value. Final premium, excess and levies are confirmed by the insurer.
insure.disc.travel: Indicative premiums by region and trip length. Cover limits and exclusions are set by the insurer's policy wording.
insure.disc.detail: Figures are indicative and traceable to the insurer's published rates. fructa never sells cover or moves money.
insure.schengenWarn: Schengen visas need a minimum medical cover; every plan shown qualifies.
insure.signalsFoot: Generated from published rates, IRA data and policy wording · not advice
insure.why.title: Why compare here
insure.why.1: Every premium ties back to the insurer's published rate.
insure.why.2: Ranked by what you actually pay, not who paid to rank.
insure.why.3: Excess, claims speed and benefits shown side by side.
insure.why.4: Nothing binds in-app; you deal with the insurer direct.
insure.privacyNote: Nothing leaves your phone until you tap call
insure.indicativeNote: Indicative premiums, including levies and stamp duty. Confirm the exact figure with each insurer.
insure.trust.title: Trust & standing
insure.trust.statMgmtBody: The IRA placed this insurer under statutory management. It cannot issue new policies. Existing policyholders are advised to seek alternative cover.
insure.trust.closedBody: This insurer is no longer licensed to write new policies.
insure.trust.combinedGood: Below 100: premiums cover claims and costs.
insure.trust.combinedBad: Above 100: paying out more than it takes in.
insure.trust.complaintsNote: Lodged with the IRA in the period.
insure.trust.licensedNote: On the IRA register for this year.
insure.dir.title: Licensed insurers
insure.dir.sub: {n} on the IRA register, {priced} with published rates
insure.dir.entry: All {n} on the IRA register, with their standing
insure.tpoUnpublished: No insurer here publishes a third-party-only price for this class yet.
insure.tpoFlat: Flat annual third-party-only premium, {class} class. Vehicle value does not affect it.
insure.trust.gradeScale: Where this sits on the GCR national scale.
insure.trust.shareSub: Only six insurers clear the line the IRA reports by name.
insure.trust.shareFoot: IRA industry release, Table 16. The other {n} insurers sit inside Others: not separately reported, never zero.
insure.trust.tl.statMgmt: Barred from writing any new contract
insure.motor.classFoot: Above 100 means insurers pay out more than they take in. Motor is the worst book in the market, which is why your renewal keeps climbing.
insure.motor.classTitle: The market loses money on this class
insure.motor.psvEmptyBody: No insurer has given us a public service vehicle rate. We would rather show you nothing than a number we made up.
insure.motor.absent: {names} do not publish a third-party-only price. They are absent from this list rather than shown at zero, because we do not know what they charge.
insure.review.title: What buyers say
insure.review.noneBody: Be the first to say what actually happened.
insure.review.writeSub: Anonymous. Your rating appears at once; your words are checked first.
insure.review.disclaimer: Reviews are opinions of Fructa users, not statements of fact by Fructa, and are not a measure of an insurer's financial strength. For that, see the rating above.
insure.review.pending: Your words are with a moderator. Your rating is already counted.
insure.review.rejected: Your words were not published: {reason}. Your rating still counts.
insure.review.rules: Write about your own experience. Do not accuse anyone of a crime, and do not name individual staff. Reviews that do are removed. Fructa does not verify claims made in reviews.
insure.review.submitted: Rating posted. Your words are with a moderator.
insure.review.placeholder: How long did a claim take? Was the assessor fair? Did the premium change on renewal?
insure.review.consent: By submitting you accept the content rules. We store no name, email or phone.
